title: Breaking Animation With Numbers
description: Simple breaking animation pack that changes destroy stages with numbers. Should be working on every version.
body:
# Breaking Animation With Numbers
Simple breaking animation pack that changes destroy stages with numbers. Should be working on every version.

![Breaking animation stages with numbers from 1 to 10.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52ae4ffb4707d2a060bb478ca82046d9263e458f.png)
